# Tiny PRD (3-task fixture)

This PRD is exactly small enough to decompose into 3 bd issues.

## Tasks

1. **Add CLI flag `--dry-run`** — print what would happen without doing it.
2. **Write integration test for `--dry-run`** — assert no side effects.
3. **Document `--dry-run` in README** — add a "Flags" section with examples.
